caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" and a matching green baseball cap with headphones is seated in front of a professional microphone. He is in a room decorated with numerous framed pictures and photographs on the wall, with a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey pants visible in the background. The setting appears to be a studio or clothing store, with racks of apparel partially visible behind him. On-screen logos include a circular emblem with the word "BOSS" and a red logo that reads "BOSS FELIX tot". Across the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing, shifting his gaze slightly as he speaks into the microphone, while the background elements remain static.
